ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assistance_programs" (
  "program_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assistance program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistance program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program and its terms */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for eligibility */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Steps and requirements for applying */,
  "reporting_requirements" TEXT /* Reporting obligations for recipients */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the program */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for program inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assistance_programs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GRANT, INTEREST SUBSIDY) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of what the category entails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "program_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the assistance program applied for */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant or organization */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "applicant_type" TEXT /* Type of applicant (e.g., business, non-profit) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "application_form" TEXT /* Path to the application form document */,
  "eligibility_status" TEXT /* Status of eligibility (e.g., eligible, not eligible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_code FOREIGN KEY ("program_code") REFERENCES assistance_programs ("program_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding distribution */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application that received funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was distributed */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, interest subsidy) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_distributions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that conducted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, final) */,
  "review_form" TEXT /* Path to the review form document */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps or actions required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
